TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Knaziy = Gaga mniq Nantowseyn Jnaysyang ka alang Knaziy. 84 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 264 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 96% niqan 253 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 4% niqan 11 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal88%, Bunun2%, Seejiq/Seediq/Seejiq/Seejiq/Sediq3%, Cou1%. Hangan alang Knai Tu-ku-bey-cu na alang Alang Knai (Alang Hongsyang) ka bsiyaq balay alang Tayal Squliq. Nniqan niya Nanto keyng Jinay go Hwasyang cwen alang Knai. Knlbangan Wa mniq mksipaw tunarac Yayung Peykang mi, Payku ddwiyaq beyhing hruwan hidaw hunac lmiqu. Nniqan lnglingay Llmiqu, haypa 1170 m. Quri ppanan rulu Mriq rulu: Tayhoku> Formosa Kwotaw 3 haw> Sweysaryeyn Kwotaw 6 haw> Tay14 seyng>Hari>Paran>Elu Rising seyng> Elu keyng cida elu Jweyyeyn> dhuq alang niyi da. Ppwaluk tyeyn-cu patas qtan alang Teyncu patas pkla nniqan alang. Klwanan sediq Tayal. Sduwi na kari saya Skari kari Tayal, ska kari Telu. Snlhayan snhiyan Kiristo kyo: Hongsyang Kiristo Cyoro Kyokay, Hongsyang Sin Yasu Kyokay. Pnyahan alang Knai pa dungus niya u "Qulung smturung krpuhan bay hidaw mrbu ka hmidaw lmiqu ssiyaw alang, wada pkdungus bay qtan ka pkbanah mbanah ka wasaw qhuni dara". Wada ka seyhu Nihong daw, miya qduriq Taiwan hini ka Kokominto seyhu, kiya ka wada pryuxun Hongsyang ka hangan alang da, Cbiyaw balay ka alang Knai pa knkingal mkpuruh ka alang wa mkrhak Yayung Peykang mi cida Yayung Tepirun, ya bay 300 mi 400 kngkawas ka prading muru elu rudan "Pyanan" mquri tudaya 8 alang pa to bay pnswayan snpeyyah Knai musa nganguc phiyu burah alang kana, so kiya daw knkingan alang hini pa ida tmhangan nanaq "Knai", dungus niya u "Pnneyyah Knai Niya". Quri pplahan mi sanan rmiwaw Qhdin Alang Qhdin. Qntan patas Jinay gokosyo wangcan:
S.PHON: = kna*ij = gaga mniq nantows…ôn …ünajsjaŇč ka alaŇč kna*ij. ** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal *% niqan ** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, tajal**%, bunun*%, s…ô…ô…üiq/s…ô…ôdiq/s…ô…ô…üiq/s…ô…ô…üiq/s…ôdiq*%, ¶ou*%. ńßaŇčan alaŇč knai tu-ku-b…ô- ¶u na alaŇč alaŇč knai (alaŇč ńßoŇčsjaŇč) ka bsijaq balaj alaŇč tajal squliq. nniqan nija nanto k…ôŇč …üinaj go ńßwasjaŇč ¶w…ôn alaŇč knai. knlbaŇčan wa mniq mksipaw tuna…ĺa ¶ jajuŇč p…ôkaŇč mi, pajku ddwijaq b…ôńßiŇč ńß…ĺuwan ńßidaw ńßuna ¶ lmiqu. nniqan lŇčliŇčaj llmiqu, ńßajpa **** m. qu…ĺi ppanan …ĺulu m…ĺiq …ĺulu: tajńßoku> *o…ĺmosa kwotaw * ńßaw> sw…ôsa…ĺj…ôn kwotaw * ńßaw> taj** s…ôŇč>ńßa…ĺi>pa…ĺan>…ôlu …ĺisiŇč s…ôŇč> …ôlu k…ôŇč ¶ida …ôlu …üw…ôj…ôn> dńßuq alaŇč niji da. ppwaluk tj…ôn- ¶u patas qtan alaŇč t…ôn ¶u patas pkla nniqan alaŇč. klwanan s…ôdiq tajal. sduwi na ka…ĺi saja ska…ĺi ka…ĺi tajal, ska ka…ĺi t…ôlu. snlńßajan snńßijan ki…ĺisto kjo: ńßoŇčsjaŇč ki…ĺisto ¶jo…ĺo kjokaj, ńßoŇčsjaŇč sin jasu kjokaj. pnjańßan alaŇč knai pa duŇčus nija u "quluŇč smtu…ĺuŇč k…ĺpuńßan baj ńßidaw m…ĺbu ka ńßmidaw lmiqu ssijaw alaŇč, wada pkduŇčus baj qtan ka pkbanańß mbanańß ka wasaw qńßuni da…ĺa". wada ka s…ôńßu nińßoŇč daw, mija qdu…ĺiq taiwan ńßini ka kokominto s…ôńßu, kija ka wada p…ĺjuxun ńßoŇčsjaŇč ka ńßaŇčan alaŇč da, ¶bijaw balaj ka alaŇč knai pa knkiŇčal mkpu…ĺuńß ka alaŇč wa mk…ĺńßak jajuŇč p…ôkaŇč mi ¶ida jajuŇč t…ôpi…ĺun, ja baj *** mi *** kŇčkawas ka p…ĺadiŇč mu…ĺu …ôlu …ĺudan "pjanan" mqu…ĺi tudaja * alaŇč pa to baj pnswajan snp…ôjańß knai musa ŇčaŇču ¶ pńßiju bu…ĺańß alaŇč kana, so kija daw knkiŇčan alaŇč ńßini pa ida tmńßaŇčan nanaq "knai", duŇčus nija u "pnn…ôjańß knai nija". qu…ĺi pplańßan mi sanan …ĺmiwaw qńßdin alaŇč qńßdin. qntan patas …üinaj gokosjo waŇč ¶an:
S.FORM: = Knaziy = Gaga mniq Nantowseyn Jnaysyang ka alang Knaziy. 84 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 264 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 96% niqan 253 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 4% niqan 11 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal88%, Bunun2%, Seejiq/Seediq/Seejiq/Seejiq/Sediq3%, Cou1%. Hangan alang Knai Tu-ku-bey-cu na alang Alang Knai (Alang Hongsyang) ka bsiyaq balay alang Tayal Squliq. Nniqan niya Nanto keyng Jinay go Hwasyang cwen alang Knai. Knlbangan Wa mniq mksipaw tunarac Yayung Peykang mi, Payku ddwiyaq beyhing hruwan hidaw hunac lmiqu. Nniqan lnglingay Llmiqu, haypa 1170 m. Quri ppanan rulu Mriq rulu: Tayhoku> Formosa Kwotaw 3 haw> Sweysaryeyn Kwotaw 6 haw> Tay14 seyng>Hari>Paran>Elu Rising seyng> Elu keyng cida elu Jweyyeyn> dhuq alang niyi da. Ppwaluk tyeyn-cu patas qtan alang Teyncu patas pkla nniqan alang. Klwanan sediq Tayal. Sduwi na kari saya Skari kari Tayal, ska kari Telu. Snlhayan snhiyan Kiristo kyo: Hongsyang Kiristo Cyoro Kyokay, Hongsyang Sin Yasu Kyokay. Pnyahan alang Knai pa dungus niya u "Qulung smturung krpuhan bay hidaw mrbu ka hmidaw lmiqu ssiyaw alang, wada pkdungus bay qtan ka pkbanah mbanah ka wasaw qhuni dara". Wada ka seyhu Nihong daw, miya qduriq Taiwan hini ka Kokominto seyhu, kiya ka wada pryuxun Hongsyang ka hangan alang da, Cbiyaw balay ka alang Knai pa knkingal mkpuruh ka alang wa mkrhak Yayung Peykang mi cida Yayung Tepirun, ya bay 300 mi 400 kngkawas ka prading muru elu rudan "Pyanan" mquri tudaya 8 alang pa to bay pnswayan snpeyyah Knai musa nganguc phiyu burah alang kana, so kiya daw knkingan alang hini pa ida tmhangan nanaq "Knai", dungus niya u "Pnneyyah Knai Niya". Quri pplahan mi sanan rmiwaw Qhdin Alang Qhdin. Qntan patas Jinay gokosyo wangcan:
S.PHON: = kna*ij = gaga mniq nantows…ôn …ünajsjaŇč ka alaŇč kna*ij. ** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal *% niqan ** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, tajal**%, bunun*%, s…ô…ô…üiq/s…ô…ôdiq/s…ô…ô…üiq/s…ô…ô…üiq/s…ôdiq*%, ¶ou*%. ńßaŇčan alaŇč knai tu-ku-b…ô- ¶u na alaŇč alaŇč knai (alaŇč ńßoŇčsjaŇč) ka bsijaq balaj alaŇč tajal squliq. nniqan nija nanto k…ôŇč …üinaj go ńßwasjaŇč ¶w…ôn alaŇč knai. knlbaŇčan wa mniq mksipaw tuna…ĺa ¶ jajuŇč p…ôkaŇč mi, pajku ddwijaq b…ôńßiŇč ńß…ĺuwan ńßidaw ńßuna ¶ lmiqu. nniqan lŇčliŇčaj llmiqu, ńßajpa **** m. qu…ĺi ppanan …ĺulu m…ĺiq …ĺulu: tajńßoku> *o…ĺmosa kwotaw * ńßaw> sw…ôsa…ĺj…ôn kwotaw * ńßaw> taj** s…ôŇč>ńßa…ĺi>pa…ĺan>…ôlu …ĺisiŇč s…ôŇč> …ôlu k…ôŇč ¶ida …ôlu …üw…ôj…ôn> dńßuq alaŇč niji da. ppwaluk tj…ôn- ¶u patas qtan alaŇč t…ôn ¶u patas pkla nniqan alaŇč. klwanan s…ôdiq tajal. sduwi na ka…ĺi saja ska…ĺi ka…ĺi tajal, ska ka…ĺi t…ôlu. snlńßajan snńßijan ki…ĺisto kjo: ńßoŇčsjaŇč ki…ĺisto ¶jo…ĺo kjokaj, ńßoŇčsjaŇč sin jasu kjokaj. pnjańßan alaŇč knai pa duŇčus nija u "quluŇč smtu…ĺuŇč k…ĺpuńßan baj ńßidaw m…ĺbu ka ńßmidaw lmiqu ssijaw alaŇč, wada pkduŇčus baj qtan ka pkbanańß mbanańß ka wasaw qńßuni da…ĺa". wada ka s…ôńßu nińßoŇč daw, mija qdu…ĺiq taiwan ńßini ka kokominto s…ôńßu, kija ka wada p…ĺjuxun ńßoŇčsjaŇč ka ńßaŇčan alaŇč da, ¶bijaw balaj ka alaŇč knai pa knkiŇčal mkpu…ĺuńß ka alaŇč wa mk…ĺńßak jajuŇč p…ôkaŇč mi ¶ida jajuŇč t…ôpi…ĺun, ja baj *** mi *** kŇčkawas ka p…ĺadiŇč mu…ĺu …ôlu …ĺudan "pjanan" mqu…ĺi tudaja * alaŇč pa to baj pnswajan snp…ôjańß knai musa ŇčaŇču ¶ pńßiju bu…ĺańß alaŇč kana, so kija daw knkiŇčan alaŇč ńßini pa ida tmńßaŇčan nanaq "knai", duŇčus nija u "pnn…ôjańß knai nija". qu…ĺi pplańßan mi sanan …ĺmiwaw qńßdin alaŇč qńßdin. qntan patas …üinaj gokosjo waŇč ¶an:
